About

The short version.

I'm Bozeman, Montana-based, providing production support and assistant director services, and available to travel worldwide. Tag me in for any help you need learning about the local communities and getting connected with vendors.

My story.

I got here by checking off a lifelong bucket list item: being an extra. Stepping onto the Yellowstone season 5 set was what opened my eyes to the possibilities in film. From there, I broke down doors to work on my first set and haven't looked back.

With a background and degree in business sales & marketing, I use my skillset to communicate, handle logistics, and keep the day moving forward calmly and joyfully.

How I work.

Organized by habit

Years of coordinating multi-location events, client pipelines, and dozens of accounts at once made tight scheduling second nature.

People person

Cultivating relationships was the whole job in my last career. That translates directly to a call sheet full of strangers on day one.

Positive & adaptable

Great at staying upbeat and making it happen, even on a shoot day gone long.

Want the full history?

The work page has the full list of credits.
